name: soma
claudeDescription: Soma connects Claude Code to a batteries-included RMCP runtime for drop-in provider-backed tools, prompts, and resources.
codexDescription: Soma is a batteries-included RMCP runtime for drop-in provider-backed agent capabilities.
geminiDescription: Soma is a batteries-included RMCP runtime for drop-in provider-backed agent capabilities.

codexInterface.longDescription: Soma runs a batteries-included RMCP server runtime. Drop in provider manifests or modules for tools, prompts, resources, and provider-backed actions; the runtime supplies MCP, CLI, REST, auth, setup, and generated metadata.
defaultPrompt: Help me add a drop-in provider to Soma.
